steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The key signal is what the collaboration demonstrates: “tribal citizens worked alongside scientists to design the methodology and continue to assist in data collection.” This shows equal participation and decision-making—exactly what “equal partners” means in the model described upfront.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
Exemplifies means “serves as a clear example of.” The collaboration is a clear example of the equal partnership model, with tribal citizens and scientists working together in both planning and execution.

The other choices contradict this: circumvents suggests avoidance, eclipses suggests surpassing, and fabricates suggests invention.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
